name: Node.js + Antigravity + Neovim
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y ripgrep fd-find build-essential && ARCH=$(dpkg --print-architecture) && if [ "$ARCH" = "arm64" ]; then NVIM_ARCH="arm64"; else NVIM_ARCH="x86_64"; fi && curl -LO https://github.com/neovim/neovim/releases/latest/download/nvim-linux-$NVIM_ARCH.tar.gz && sudo tar -C /opt -xzf nvim-linux-$NVIM_ARCH.tar.gz && sudo ln -sf /opt/nvim-linux-$NVIM_ARCH/bin/nvim /usr/local/bin/nvim && rm nvim-linux-$NVIM_ARCH.tar.gz && npm install && curl -fsSL https://antigravity.google/cli/install.sh | bash
